_comment: Values screening presets - pure data, no religion/company/country references in code. A profile = a list of rules; rule kinds are interpreted by amy/values/__init__.py. Users copy a preset into their own editable profile.

presets.name: Interest-free finance
presets.description: Flags interest charges and interest-bearing products so money can be kept free of paid/earned pure interest.

rules.pattern: finance charge|interest (charged|debited|levied)|\bint\.? (on|chg)|overdraft interest|late payment interest|emi interest|interest on (loan|card|overdraft)
rules.reason: Transaction description indicates a pure interest charge.
Incoming pure interest — this profile flags earned interest for review/redirection.
Interest-based financing conflicts with this profile; markup or lease-based structures are the compliant alternatives.

presets.name: ESG basics
presets.description: Flags spending at merchant types commonly excluded by environmental/social screens.

presets.name: Budget discipline
presets.description: Flags any single purchase that exceeds a set share of monthly income.

rules.reason: Single purchase exceeds the configured share of monthly income.
